404 Augment Not Found.name: 404 Augment Not Found
404 Augment Not Found.desc: Gain 3 hats per round. Error: This augment is granted when an effect attempts to grant an invalid or duplicate augment.

???.desc: Your Enemy Missing pings will cause you to launch a missile at the pinged location, exploding upon arrival to deal 100 – 400 (based on level) (+ 10% of target's missing health) magic damage to enemies struck, and heal allied champions within for 50 – 200 (based on level) (+ 10% of target's missing health).

Accelerating Sorcery.name: Accelerating Sorcery
Accelerating Sorcery.desc: Casting an ability grants ability haste. This effect stacks infinitely and lasts until the end of the current round phase. Lv 1: 8 ability haste. Lv 2: 12 ability haste. Lv 3: 18 ability haste.

Adamant.name: Adamant
Adamant.desc: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion grants 2 – 10 (based on level) bonus armor and bonus magic resistance for 10 seconds, stacking up to 10 times for a total of 20 – 100 (based on level) bonus resistances, and refreshing on subsequent triggers ( 5 seconds cooldown per cast instance).

ADAPt.name: ADAPt
ADAPt.desc: Convert all of your bonus attack damage into ability power. Additionally, increase your ability power by a percentage. Lv 1: Conversion rate: 1.67 ability power per 1 bonus attack damage. Increase ability power by 10%. Lv 2: Conversion rate: 2.22 ability power per 1 bonus attack damage. Increase ability power by 20%.

Aim for the Head.name: Aim for the Head
Aim for the Head.desc: Gain 25% critical strike chance and 25% bonus critical damage. Your critical strike chance is capped at 50%. Convert a portion of excess critical strike chance into bonus critical damage. Lv 1: 50% convert ratio. Lv 2: 60% convert ratio.

All For You.name: All For You
All For You.desc: The effectiveness of your heals and shields is increased on allied champions. Lv 1: Increased by 25%. Lv 2: Increased by 40%.

And My Axe!.name: And My Axe!
And My Axe!.desc: Automatically cast Olaf's Undertow, throwing an axe at the nearest visible enemy champion within 950 units. Enemies hit are dealt physical damage, slowed for 1.5 seconds and have 20% reduced armor and magic resistance for 4 seconds ( 12 seconds cooldown). The caster can pick up the axe by walking within 250 units of its landing location, reducing the effect's current cooldown to 1.5 seconds or immediately resetting it if that has already elapsed. The axe has a width of 180 units and can additionally hit targets in a 100-unit radius upon landing. Lv 1: 65 – 150 (based on level) (+ 80% bonus AD) (+ 45% AP) physical damage. Slowed by 25%. Lv 2: 185 – 270 (based on level) (+ 80% bonus AD) (+ 45% AP) physical damage. Slowed by 45%.

Apex Inventor.name: Apex Inventor
Apex Inventor.desc: Grants item haste. Lv 1: 100 item haste, which is equivalent to 50% cooldown reduction for items. Lv 2: 300 item haste, which is equivalent to 75% cooldown reduction for items.

Augment 405.name: Augment 405
Augment 405.desc: Gain 5% increased damage per hat. Error: This augment is granted when Parasitic or Symbiotic Mutation attempts to grant a duplicate augment, including itself.

Augmented Power.name: Augmented Power
Augmented Power.desc: Your augments and items deal increased damage. Lv 1: 20% (+ 1% per 100 AD) (+ 1% per 100 AP) increased damage. Lv 2: 40% (+ 1% per 100 AD) (+ 1% per 100 AP) increased damage. Max-level effect: Heal for 50% damage done by augments and items.

Back to Basics.name: Back to Basics
Back to Basics.desc: Your champion abilities deal increased damage and you gain ability haste and increased healing and shielding from all sources, but your ultimate ability is permanently sealed. Lv 1: 25% increased damage. 45 ability haste. 25% increased healing and shielding. Lv 2: 30% increased damage. 60 ability haste. 30% increased healing and shielding. Lv 3: 45% increased damage. 90 ability haste. 45% increased healing and shielding. Max-level effect: Gain 5% increased damage and 10 ability haste for each level of your ultimate.

Banner of Command.name: Banner of Command
Banner of Command.desc: Replaces Flee with Banner of Command. Banner of Command: Grants your ally 15% size, bonus health, attack damage, ability power, and attack speed for 10 seconds. Lv 1: 15% bonus size, health, attack damage, ability power and attack speed. 10 seconds duration. Lv 2: 25% bonus size, health, attack damage, ability power and attack speed. 15 seconds duration.

Big Brain.name: Big Brain
Big Brain.desc: At the start of the combat phase in each round, gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to a multiple of your AP and lasts until destroyed. Lv 1: 300% AP shield. Lv 2: 400% AP shield. Max-level effect: Refresh the shield after 3 seconds out of combat.

Big Dragon Energy.name: Big Dragon Energy
Big Dragon Energy.desc: Start combat with full Dragon Fury and it no longer decays while in Dragon Form. While in Dragon Form Emberstrike's final strike does 200% true damage. This augment is only available for Shyvana.

Blade Waltz.name: Blade Waltz
Blade Waltz.desc: Replaces Flee with Blade Waltz. Blade Waltz: Blink to the target enemy champion. After 0.25 seconds, you then blink to the nearest other enemy champion every 0.25 seconds over the next 1.25 seconds, blinking up to 5 additional times. Each time you blink to a target, deal 30 – 150 (based on level) (+ 10% bonus AD) (+ 6% AP) physical damage to them and apply on-hit effects at 50% effectiveness, up to a total of 180 – 900 (based on level) (+ 60% bonus AD) (+ 36% AP). While Blade Waltz is active, you are untargetable and unable to act. This effect will end prematurely if there are no longer any nearby valid targets to blink to. A target can be blinked to more than once if there are no other valid targets in range. Lv 1: 6 hits in total. Lv 2: 8 hits in total. Lv 3: 10 hits in total. Max-level effect: After Blade Waltz finishes, generate a healing zone that heals you and your allies for 100 (+ 40% bonus AD) + (+ 40% AP) per second, for a total of 500 (+ 200% bonus AD) + (+ 200% AP) over 5 seconds.

Blood Brother.name: Blood Brother
Blood Brother.desc: Gain Darius' Hemorrhage. Passive: Damaging basic attacks and abilities apply a stack of Hemorrhage to enemies for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 5 times. Hemorrhage: For each stack, the target is dealt 「 15 – 45 (based on level) (+ 40% AD) total physical damage 」「 3.75 – 11.25 (based on level) (+ 10% AD) physical damage every 1.25 seconds 」 over the duration, up to a maximum of「 75 – 225 (based on level) (+ 200% AD) total physical damage over the duration. 」「 18.75 – 56.25 (based on level) (+ 50% AD) physical damage with each tick. 」 Noxian Might: When you apply 5 stacks of Hemorrhage to an enemy champion, become empowered with Noxian Might for 5 seconds, granting you 30 – 270 (based on level) bonus attack damage. This augment is only available for Draven.

Blunt Force.name: Blunt Force
Blunt Force.desc: Increases total attack damage by a percentage. Lv 1: 10% total attack damage Lv 2: 25% total attack damage

Bodyguard.name: Bodyguard
Bodyguard.desc: Dashing or blinking grants a 35 – 250 (based on level) base shield, increased by 90 – 250 (based on the source spell's base cooldown) for 2.5 seconds ( 0.1 seconds cooldown per cast instance; 3 seconds cooldown per source). Any allies you pass through are also granted the same shield you have generated ( 200 radius of collision). Up to 5 shields generated can stack on a given champion, refreshing with each generation.

Bounce of the Poro King.name: Bounce of the Poro King
Bounce of the Poro King.desc: Replace Flee with Bounce of the Poro King. Bounce of the Poro King: Transform into the Poro King for 3 seconds, during which you gain 70% damage reduction, 40% bonus movement speed, crowd control immunity, and ghosting, but become unable to declare basic attacks and cast abilities. Upon transformation, you also cleanse yourself of all crowd control. While transformed, you bounce up and down every 1 second, with each bounce dealing 100 – 700 (based on level) physical damage to nearby enemy champions and knocking them back upon landing. An enemy champion can be hit by multiple bounces, but ones beyond the first do not apply the knock back.

Bravest of the Brave.name: Bravest of the Brave
Bravest of the Brave.desc: The tier of all future augment offerings is increased. If the offered augment is already prismatic, then you gain a certain amount of gold instead. Lv 1: Tier increases by 1. Gain 750. Lv 2: Tier increases by 2. Gain 1500.

Bread And Butter.name: Bread And Butter
Bread And Butter.desc: Your champion's first basic ability (Q) gains ability haste. Lv 1: 100 ability haste. Lv 2: 200 ability haste. Max-level effect: Casting your first basic ability grants you 40% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

Bread And Cheese.name: Bread And Cheese
Bread And Cheese.desc: Your champion's third basic ability (E) gains ability haste. Lv 1: 100 ability haste. Lv 2: 200 ability haste. Max-level effect: Casting your third basic ability grants you 40% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

Bread And Jam.name: Bread And Jam
Bread And Jam.desc: Your champion's second basic ability (W) gains ability haste. Lv 1: 100 ability haste. Lv 2: 200 ability haste. Max-level effect: Casting your second basic ability grants you 40% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

Bread Sandwich.name: Bread Sandwich
Bread Sandwich.desc: Gain ability haste. Casting an ability grants you 40% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds. Lv 1: 200 ability haste. Lv 2: 300 ability haste. Lv 3: 400 ability haste.

Buff Buddies.name: Buff Buddies
Buff Buddies.desc: Grants Crest of Cinders and Crest of Insight permanently. This counts as a Burn source. Lv 2: Max-level effect: Grants to your allies as well.

Calculated Risk.name: Calculated Risk
Calculated Risk.desc: Your rerolls are consumed by this effect and you can no longer gain any rerolls for the remainder of the game. If you have more than 2 augments, selecting this augment immediately offers a Gold-tier augment selection screen. If you have at most 2 augments, selecting this augment immediately offers a Prismatic-tier augment selection screen.

Can't Touch This.name: Can't Touch This
Can't Touch This.desc: Casting your ultimate grants you invulnerability for 2 seconds ( 8 seconds cooldown).

Cannon Fodder.name: Cannon Fodder
Cannon Fodder.desc: At the start of the combat phase in each round, launch yourself from a catapult. The catapult lasts for up to 20 seconds before expiring.

Castle.name: Castle
Castle.desc: Replaces Flee with Castle. Castle: Dash to your ally's location while they do so to yours, swapping places with them. You then both gain 40% bonus movement speed and a shield for 80 – 250 (based on level) (+ 5% of their maximum health) (respectively), both for 4 seconds. Can be used while the ally is dead to dash to their location. Lv 1: 40% bonus movement speed. Lv 2: 80% bonus movement speed. Max-level effect: Passing through an enemy champion refreshes the duration of the shield and doubles it.

Celestial Body.name: Celestial Body
Celestial Body.desc: Gain bonus health, but reduce your damage output. Lv 1: 1000 bonus health. Damage reduced by 10%. Lv 2: 2000 bonus health. Damage reduced by 5%. Lv 3: 3000 bonus health. Damage reduction is removed.

Center of the Universe.name: Center of the Universe
Center of the Universe.desc: Gain Aurelion Sol's Center of the Universe. Center of the Universe: You are now permanently orbited by 6 Stars that exist at your attack range, and rotate clockwise one after another at the same constant speed. Each Star deals 5 – 160 (based on level) (+ 25% bonus AD) (+ 12% AP) magic damage to enemies that come into contact with it and has a width of 50 units.

Cerberus.name: Cerberus
Cerberus.desc: Gain the Hail of Blades and Press the Attack keystone runes. See Arena#Runes for Arena-specific overrides on these runes.

Chain Lightning.name: Chain Lightning
Chain Lightning.desc: Dealing damage to an enemy champion also damages the nearest other champion within 800 units of them for true damage equal to a portion of damage instance post-mitigation. Lv 1: 25% damage transmission efficiency. Lv 2: 40% damage transmission efficiency.

Chauffeur.name: Chauffeur
Chauffeur.desc: Become attached to your ally for the rest of the game, granting them 100% of your bonus movement speed as well as gaining ability haste and bonus attack speed. Dashing or blinking detaches you for 1.5 seconds before attaching you back to your ally. While your ally is downed, the link is temporarily broken. Lv 1: 110 ability haste. 60% bonus attack speed. Lv 2: 170 ability haste. 85% bonus attack speed.

Chroma Flux.name: Chroma Flux
Chroma Flux.desc: Automatically cast Ezreal's Essence Flux towards an enemy. The magical orb sticks to the first enemy champion, structure, or epic jungle monster hit and marks them for 4 seconds ( 15 seconds cooldown). Hitting the marked target with a basic attack or an ability will detonate the mark, deal (75 (+ 30% bonus AD) (+ 50% AP)) ( × (1 + number of augments with a red sticker you have)) magic damage and grant you 5 (+ 30 × number of augments with a blue sticker you have) bonus movement speed, 10 (+ 30 × number of augments with a green sticker you have) armor and magic resistance for 3 seconds.

Circle of Death.name: Circle of Death
Circle of Death.desc: Healing and health regeneration you do causes you to deal a ratio of that value in magic damage to the nearest enemy champion within 1000 units. Lv 1: 50% heal and health regen converted to damage. Lv 2: 100% heal and health regen converted to damage.

Clothesline.name: Clothesline
Clothesline.desc: Form a tether between you and your ally that continuously Burns enemies it touches, dealing magic damage every 0.25 seconds. The tether has a width of 100 units. Attributes the damage to the player who has equipped Clothesline. Lv 1: 5 – 200 (based on level) (+ 28% bonus AD) (+ 16% AP) (+ 2% maximum health) magic damage. Lv 2: 5 – 200 (based on level) (+ 36% bonus AD) (+ 28% AP) (+ 3% maximum health) magic damage.

Clown College.name: Clown College
Clown College.desc: Gain Shaco's Backstab, Deceive and Hallucinate's explosion. Replaces Flee with Deceive. Passive - Backstab: Your basic attacks deal 20 – 35 (based on level) (+ 50% bonus AD) (+ 35% AP) bonus physical damage on-hit when hitting an enemy from behind. Active - Deceive: Become invisible for up to 3 seconds and blink to the target location within 400 units after a 0.125-second delay. Your next basic attack while in stealth deals 100 (+ 150% bonus AD) (+ 55% AP) bonus physical damage, increased to「 (155% + crit damage) damage 」「 100 × (1.55 + crit damage) (+ 150% × (1.55 + crit damage) bonus AD) (+ 55% × (1.55 + crit damage) AP) bonus physical damage 」 if Backstab was applied ( 15 seconds cooldown). Passive - Hallucinate: Upon your death, release an explosion in a 350 radius of your death location, dealing 25% of target's maximum health true damage to enemies within and fearing them for 1 second. This effect cannot award victory to the user if they are the last one standing on their team.

Combination Fried Rice.name: Combination Fried Rice
Combination Fried Rice.desc: Your abilities gains increased damage, healing and shielding. However, you lose 50 ability haste. Casting an ability grants you 40% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds. Lv 1: 100% increased damage. 75% healing and shielding. Lv 2: 125% increased damage. 100% healing and shielding. Lv 3: 150% increased damage. 125% healing and shielding.

Combo Master.name: Combo Master
Combo Master.desc: Gain the Electrocute and Phase Rush keystone runes. See Arena#Runes for Arena-specific overrides on these runes.

Contract Killer.name: Contract Killer
Contract Killer.desc: At the start of the combat phase in each round, mark a champion on the enemy team. The mark causes them to take increased damage from your team and dispense an additional kill bounty of 150 when slain. This bounty is granted to both you and your ally when the marked target is slain. Each enemy champion can only have one mark per round. Lv 1: 20% increased damage. Lv 2: 30% increased damage.

Courage of the Colossus.name: Courage of the Colossus
Courage of the Colossus.desc: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion grants a shield based on your maximum health for 3 seconds ( 5 seconds cooldown per cast instance). Shields can stack between multiple triggers of this effect, though not refreshing the duration of previous shields. Lv 1: 100 – 300 (based on level) (+ 3% maximum health) shield. Lv 2: 100 – 300 (based on level) (+ 7% maximum health) shield. Lv 3: 100 – 300 (based on level) (+ 11% maximum health) shield. Max-level effect: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion also grants you 5% increased size and 1% tenacity.

Crack Open That Egg.name: Crack Open That Egg
Crack Open That Egg.desc: Your shields detonate upon expiration, creating an explosion that deals magic damage equal to a multiple of the shield to nearby enemies. Lv 1: 100% shield converted to damage. Lv 2: 200% shield converted to damage. Lv 3: 300% shield converted to damage.

Critical Healing.name: Critical Healing
Critical Healing.desc: Your heals and shields now have a chance equal to your critical strike chance to increase. The effectiveness benefits from your crit damage. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance. Lv 1: Increase by 35% + crit damage. Lv 2: Increase by 55% + crit damage.

Critical Rhythm.name: Critical Rhythm
Critical Rhythm.desc: Your critical strikes grant you 6% bonus attack speed for 6 seconds, stacking up to several times. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance. Lv 1: Stacks up to 10 times, for a total of 60% attack speed. Lv 2: Stacks up to 20 times, for a total of 120% attack speed. Lv 3: Stacks up to 30 times, for a total of 180% attack speed. Max-level effect: Attack speed cap increases to 10.

Dark Blessing.name: Dark Blessing
Dark Blessing.desc: The next instance of healing or shielding you grant to an ally generates 5 Cursed Power ( 1.5 seconds cooldown). You can generate up to 30 (+ 20 × number of Curse augments equipped by you and your teammate) Cursed Power per round. Permanently gain ability haste equal to a percentage of your Cursed Power. Lv 1: 30% convert rate. Lv 2: 55% convert rate.

Dashing.name: Dashing
Dashing.desc: Abilities with dashes or blinks gain ability haste. On Kalista, Martial Poise's dash gains bonus movement speed toward its speed scaling instead. Lv 1: 200 ability haste. 53.3% bonus movement speed for Kalista. Lv 2: 275 ability haste. 73.3% bonus movement speed for Kalista. Lv 3: 350 ability haste. 93.3% bonus movement speed for Kalista. Max-level effect: Dashing or blinking also grants you 30% tenacity for 3 seconds.

Dawnbringer's Resolve.name: Dawnbringer's Resolve
Dawnbringer's Resolve.desc: Upon dropping below 60% maximum health for the first time, you are healed for a certain amount of maximum health over 3 seconds. Lv 1: Heal for 25% maximum health. Lv 2: Heal for 30% maximum health. Max-level effect: Dropping below 30% maximum health will trigger this effect again.

Deathtouch.name: Deathtouch
Deathtouch.desc: Basic attacks against champions on-hit generate 2 Cursed Power. You can generate up to 30 (+ 20 × number of Curse augments equipped by you and your teammate) Cursed Power per round. Permanently gain bonus magic damage on-hit equal to a percentage of your Cursed Power. Lv 1: 20% convert rate. Lv 2: 35% convert rate.

Defensive Maneuvers.name: Defensive Maneuvers
Defensive Maneuvers.desc: Replaces Flee with Defensive Maneuvers. Defensive Maneuvers: Casts both Barrier and Heal on you and your ally. Barrier: Grants a 110 – 440 (based on level) shield for 2.5 seconds. Heal: Heals for 80 – 318 (based on level) and grants 30% bonus movement speed for 1 second. Lv 1: 30% bonus movement speed. Lv 2: 50% bonus movement speed. Max-level effect: This casts a second time 2.5 seconds after you cast it.

Deft.name: Deft
Deft.desc: Grants bonus attack speed. Lv 1: 40% bonus attack speed. Lv 2: 75% bonus attack speed. Lv 3: 120% bonus attack speed. Max-level effect: Attack speed cap increases to 10.

Dematerialize.name: Dematerialize
Dematerialize.desc: Scoring a champion takedown grants permanent adaptive force. This effect can be triggered only once per champion per round. If this is your second augment, also gain 18 bonus Attack Damage or 30 Ability Power (Adaptive). Lv 1: 6 bonus Attack Damage or 10 Ability Power (Adaptive). Lv 2: 12 bonus Attack Damage or 20 Ability Power (Adaptive).

Demon's Dance.name: Demon's Dance
Demon's Dance.desc: Gain the Fleet Footwork and Grasp of the Undying keystone runes. See Arena#Runes for Arena-specific overrides on these runes.

Demonic Clasp.name: Demonic Clasp
Demonic Clasp.desc: Replaces Flee with Demonic Clasp. Demonic Clasp: Call 1 / 3 / 5 (based on level) claws, each of which pulls enemies towards your direction and deals 100 / 200 / 250 (based on level) (+ 40% AP) magic damage. Lv 1: 1 claw. 100 (+ 40% AP) magic damage. Lv 2: 3 claws. 200 (+ 40% AP) magic damage. Lv 3: 5 claws. 250 (+ 40% AP) magic damage. Max-level effect: Each claw swipes for 3 times.

Desecrator.name: Desecrator
Desecrator.desc: Immobilizing an enemy champion generates 10 Cursed Power. You can generate up to 30 (+ 20 × number of Curse augments equipped by you and your teammate) Cursed Power per round. Permanently gain bonus armor and bonus magic resistance equal to a percentage of your Cursed Power. Lv 1: 20% convert rate. Lv 2: 30% convert rate.

Despoil.name: Despoil
Despoil.desc: Dashing or blinking near an enemy champion generates 2 Cursed Power. You can generate up to 30 (+ 20 × number of Curse augments equipped by you and your teammate) Cursed Power per round. Permanently gain bonus movement speed equal to 10% of your Cursed Power.

Devil on Your Shoulder.name: Devil on Your Shoulder
Devil on Your Shoulder.desc: Forge a pact with Little Devil Teemo, who drains 0.5% of your current health every second, increased to 5% if there are enemy champions within 1000 units. In return, you deal bonus true damage and your basic attacks and abilities summon a Life Remnant nearby for 5 seconds (0.75-second spawn cooldown). You can absorb a Life Remnant by moving over it, healing you for 100 – 250 (based on level) (+ 60% bonus AD) (+ 30% AP) and granting you bonus movement speed. Lv 1: 10% bonus true damage. 20% bonus movement speed. Lv 2: 20% bonus true damage. 30% bonus movement speed. Lv 3: 30% bonus true damage. 50% bonus movement speed.

Die Another Day.name: Die Another Day
Die Another Day.desc: Replaces Flee with Die Another Day. Die Another Day: Blesses the ground underneath you, summoning a zone for 4 seconds that grants a minimum health threshold to all units inside equal to 10% of their maximum health. At the end of the duration, units inside are healed for 250.

Dive Bomber.name: Dive Bomber
Dive Bomber.desc: Your team's first death each round creates an explosion at the location of the champion that died, dealing true damage equal to a percentage of the target's maximum health to enemies within 500 units. This effect cannot award victory to the user if they are the last one standing on their team. Lv 1: 15% of the target's maximum health. Lv 2: 30% of the target's maximum health.

Divine Intervention.name: Divine Intervention
Divine Intervention.desc: Automatically cast Taric's Cosmic Radiance, calling down a protective star upon you that descends over 2.5 seconds. Afterwards, you and your teammate within 400 units become invulnerable for 2.5 seconds. This effect activates 9.5 seconds after the start of the Combat Phase. Lv 1: 25 seconds cooldown. Lv 2: 15 seconds cooldown. Max-level effect: This effect will cast for the first time you drop below 50% maximum health in each combat.

Don't Blink.name: Don't Blink
Don't Blink.desc: Deal increased damage based on movement speed you have more than the target. Lv 1: 1% increased damage per 10 movement speed difference. Lv 2: 2% increased damage per 10 movement speed difference.

Don't Chase.name: Don't Chase
Don't Chase.desc: Gain and activate Singed's Poison Trail. Poison Trail: Gain ghosting and continually create a toxic cloud behind you that lingers for 3.25 seconds. The cloud inflicts poison to enemies within every 0.5 seconds, which deals 3.75 – 31.25 (based on level) (+ 5% bonus AD) (+ 2.5% AP) magic damage every 0.25 seconds over 2 seconds.

Doomsayer.name: Doomsayer
Doomsayer.desc: The next instance of ability damage against enemy champions generates 2 Cursed Power ( 3 seconds cooldown). You can generate up to 30 (+ 20 × number of Curse augments equipped by you and your teammate) Cursed Power per round. Permanently gain adaptive force equal to a percentage of your Cursed Power. Lv 1: 80% convert rate. Lv 2: 125% convert rate. Lv 3: 150% convert rate.

Double Tap.name: Double Tap
Double Tap.desc: Basic attacks that critically strike apply on-hit effects an additional time. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

Draw Your Sword.name: Draw Your Sword
Draw Your Sword.desc: Become melee, modifying your attack range to 200 units. Additionally, gain bonus attack damage, bonus attack speed, bonus health, 15% bonus movement speed and 25% life steal. These bonuses are increased by 0% – 30% (based on champion's default attack range). This augment is only available for ranged champions. Lv 1: 25% bonus attack damage. 20% bonus attack speed. 25% bonus health. Lv 2: 30% bonus attack damage. 25% bonus attack speed. 30% bonus health. Lv 3: 35% bonus attack damage. 30% bonus attack speed. 35% bonus health.

Dreadbringer.name: Dreadbringer
Dreadbringer.desc: For every 0.5 seconds that you are within 500 units of an enemy champion, generate 1 Cursed Power for each one in range. You can generate up to 30 (+ 20 × number of Curse augments equipped by you and your teammate) Cursed Power per round. Permanently gain bonus health equal to a percentage of your Cursed Power. Lv 1: 300% convert rate. Lv 2: 600% convert rate.

Dual Wield.name: Dual Wield
Dual Wield.desc: Your basic attacks launch a bolt at the target that fires after a 0.225-second delay on-attack, deals 40% damage of the triggering attack's pre-mitigation damage, and applies on-hit effects at 40% effectiveness. Additionally, increase your total attack speed. Lv 1: 20% total attack speed. Lv 2: 25% total attack speed. Lv 3: 30% total attack speed. Max-level effect: Attack speed cap increases to 99.

Earthwake.name: Earthwake
Earthwake.desc: Dashing or blinking causes you to leave behind a trail from the location you moved to your destination that detonates after 0.75 seconds in a 300 radius, dealing physical damage per explosion to enemies hit. Enemies can only be affected once every 0.5 seconds from all cast instances. Lv 1: 140 – 300 (based on level) (+ 80% bonus AD) (+ 20% AP) physical damage. Lv 2: 140 – 300 (based on level) (+ 100% bonus AD) (+ 30% AP) physical damage. Lv 3: 140 – 300 (based on level) (+ 120% bonus AD) (+ 40% AP) physical damage. Max-level effect: When it triggers, it repeats for another time.

Energetic.name: Energetic
Energetic.desc: Gain increased Energized stack generation. Upon triggering an Energized effect, fire a bolt that deals true damage equal to 0.3% of the target's maximum health. Lv 1: 200% stack generation. Lv 2: 300% stack generation.

Erosion.name: Erosion
Erosion.desc: Each instance of damage dealt to an enemy reduces their armor and magic resistance for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20 times. Lv 1: Reduce armor and magic resistance by 1% per stack. Max armor and magic resistance reduction: 20% . Lv 2: Reduce armor and magic resistance by 2% per stack. Max armor and magic resistance reduction: 40% . Max-level effect: At 20 stacks, the target is slowed by 30%.

EscAPADe.name: EscAPADe
EscAPADe.desc: Convert all of your ability power into bonus attack damage. Additionally, increase your total attack damage. Lv 1: 0.6 bonus attack damage per 1 ability power. 10% total attack damage. Lv 2: 0.8 bonus attack damage per 1 ability power. 20% total attack damage.

Escape Plan.name: Escape Plan
Escape Plan.desc: Upon dropping below 35% health, gain a shield for 65% of your maximum health, 150% bonus movement speed, and reduced size ( 75 seconds cooldown). These effects all decay over 5 seconds.

Ethereal Weapon.name: Ethereal Weapon
Ethereal Weapon.desc: Your abilities apply on-hit effects at 100% effectiveness a number of times ( 1 second cooldown per target). Lv 1: 1 time. Lv 2: 2 times. Lv 3: 3 times.

Eureka.name: Eureka
Eureka.desc: Gain ability haste based on your ability power. Lv 1: 20% AP converted to ability haste. Lv 2: 30% AP converted to ability haste. Lv 3: 45% AP converted to ability haste.

Executioner.name: Executioner
Executioner.desc: Deal increased damage to enemies below a certain health threshold. Scoring a champion takedown resets the cooldown of all your basic abilities. Lv 1: 10% increased damage. below 40% health. Lv 2: 20% increased damage. below 50% health.

Extendo-Arm.name: Extendo-Arm
Extendo-Arm.desc: Automatically cast Blitzcrank's Rocket Grab at a nearby enemy champion, pulling the first target hit towards you and stunning them for 1 second ( 12 seconds cooldown). Lv 2: Max-level effect: Fire a second hook as soon as the first one is fired.

Fallen Aegis.name: Fallen Aegis
Fallen Aegis.desc: At the start of the combat phase in each round, gain Morgana's Black Shield, granting you a shield that absorbs magic damage and grants crowd control immunity while it holds. The shield's duration is refreshed once the initial delay for the combat phase is over. Lv 1: 8 seconds duration. 150 – 300 (based on level) shield. Lv 2: 10 seconds duration. 250 – 400 (based on level) shield. Max-level effect: Regain this shield when revived by the revive circle or when exiting stasis status.

Fan the Hammer.name: Fan the Hammer
Fan the Hammer.desc: Your next basic attack in each cardinal direction within 750 range additionally on-attack fires 5 bolts at the target that each deals 10 – 52.5 (based on level) (+ 15% bonus AD) physical damage. Each direction has unique cooldown. Bolts' damage is increased by 0% – 50% (based on distance travelled). Each bolt can critically strike and applies on-hit effects at 20% effectiveness. Lv 1: 7 seconds cooldown per direction. Lv 2: 5 seconds cooldown per direction. Max-level effect: Firing from a different direction increases the number of bolts to be fired subsequently, for the rest of the round.

Feel the Burn.name: Feel the Burn
Feel the Burn.desc: Replaces Flee with Feel the Burn. Feel the Burn: Casts both Exhaust and Ignite on all enemy champions within 1000 units, with the former having its slow strength increased to 50% and the latter modified to deal 100 – 600 (based on level) true damage over the duration. This counts as a Burn source.

Fey Magic.name: Fey Magic
Fey Magic.desc: Damaging enemies with your ultimate ability polymorphs them into harmless critters for 2 seconds, during which their base movement speed is reduced by 60, and disarms them for the same duration ( 15 seconds cooldown per target).

Final Form.name: Final Form
Final Form.desc: Casting your ultimate ability empowers you for 5 seconds, causing you to gain a shield based on your maximum health, omnivamp, and 30% bonus movement speed for the duration ( 20 seconds cooldown). Lv 1: 30% of your maximum health shield. 15% omnivamp. Lv 2: 35% of your maximum health shield. 20% Omnivamp.

Fire Sale.name: Fire Sale
Fire Sale.desc: Upon selecting this augment, all of your current items are sold to the shop at a higher gold value (Starter Items & Boots: 500, Legendary Item: 2500, Prismatic Item: 4000). Quest items ( Needlessly Large Rod, The Golden Spatula, Wooglet's Witchcap, as well as Heartsteel if you have the Quest: Steel Your Heart augment) and consumables will not be sold from this effect. When this augment is removed or replaced, gain gold equal to 30% of gold gained from this augment.

Firebrand.name: Firebrand
Firebrand.desc: Basic attacks on-hit apply a Burn for 5 seconds that deals bonus magic damage based on the target's maximum health. This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application. This counts as a Burn source. Lv 1: 「 0.6% of the target's maximum health magic damage per second. 」「 3% of the target's maximum health magic damage over the duration. 」 Lv 2: 「 0.8% of the target's maximum health magic damage per second. 」「 4% of the target's maximum health magic damage over the duration. 」 Max-level effect: Heal for 50% of the damage dealt by this effect.

Firefox.name: Firefox
Firefox.desc: Automatically cast Ahri's Fox-Fire, gaining 50% bonus movement speed that decays over 2 seconds and conjuring 3 flames that orbit you clockwise for up to 2.5 seconds at a radius of 150 units. The flames will fly toward the nearest visible enemy champion within 550 units, dealing 35 – 160 (based on level) (+ 25% bonus AD (+ 25% AP) magic damage, reduced to 「 10.5 – 48 (based on level) (+ 7.5% bonus AD (+ 7.5% AP) 」「 30% of the original damage 」 for enemies hit by subsequent flames from the same cast ( 7 seconds cooldown).

First-Aid Kit.name: First-Aid Kit
First-Aid Kit.desc: Grants heal and shield power. Lv 1: 20% heal and shield power. Lv 2: 35% heal and shield power.

Flashbang.name: Flashbang
Flashbang.desc: Using Flash creates an explosion around the blink location that deals 70 – 240 (based on level) (+ 70% AD) (+ 60% AP) magic damage to nearby enemies and slows them by 35% for 1.25 seconds. Additionally, the cooldown of your Flash resets every round. Removed since V26.09.

Flashy.name: Flashy
Flashy.desc: Your Flash now has multiple charges with a 2-second cooldown between casts, gaining maximum charges at the start of each phase in a round. Additionally, the cooldown of your Flash resets every round. Lv 1: 2 charges. Lv 2: 3 charges. Max-level effect: Flash creates an explosion at a 500 radius around you, dealing 35 – 120 (based on level) (+ 35% bonus AD) (+ 30% AP) magic damage to enemies within and slowing them by 35% for 1.25 seconds.

From Beginning to End.name: From Beginning to End
From Beginning to End.desc: Gain the Dark Harvest and First Strike keystone runes. Additionally, for each augment equipped before selecting this one, gain 8 Souls of Dark Harvest for free. See Arena#Runes for Arena-specific overrides on these keystones.

Frost Wraith.name: Frost Wraith
Frost Wraith.desc: Automatically cast Lissandra's Ring of Frost, creating a cold pulse around you in 450 radius that roots nearby enemies for 1.25 seconds ( 6.5 seconds cooldown).

Frozen Foundations.name: Frozen Foundations
Frozen Foundations.desc: Replaces Flee with Frozen Foundations. Frozen Foundations: Summons a wall of ice at the target location for 5 seconds, knocking aside enemies in the area. The wall has a width of 500 units and a knock back distance of 120 units for champions and 250 units for non-champions.

Fruits of Your Labor.name: Fruits of Your Labor
Fruits of Your Labor.desc: Increase the effects of Power Flowers. When you hit a Power Flower, your teammate gains its effects as well regardless of range and you both gain 40% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds. Lv 1: 20% extra effectiveness on yourself. Lv 2: 40% extra effectiveness on yourself.

Gamba Anvil.name: Gamba Anvil
Gamba Anvil.desc: Gain 1000. Additionally, in your Shop, the cost of Prismatic Item Anvils, all Legendary Item Anvils and Stat Bonus Anvils is reduced. The resale value of all Prismatic items and Legendary items is also reduced. Lv 1: The cost of Prismatic Item Anvils is reduced to 2500, but the resale value of all Prismatic items is also reduced to 1250. The cost of all Legendary Item Anvils is reduced to 1500, but the resale value of all Legendary Items is also reduced to 687.5. The cost of Stat Bonus Anvils is reduced by 250.

Get Excited!.name: Get Excited!
Get Excited!.desc: Scoring a champion takedown grants you bonus movement speed and 15% bonus attack speed for 6 seconds. Lv 1: 100% bonus movement speed. Lv 2: 200% bonus movement speed. Max-level effect: Attack speed cap increases to 10.

Giant Slayer.name: Giant Slayer
Giant Slayer.desc: Become tiny, reducing your size and gaining bonus movement speed. Additionally, deal bonus damage against enemy champions with greater size than you. Lv 1: 20% reduced size. 25% bonus movement speed. 10% / 15% / 25% / 30% (based on target's size) bonus damage. Lv 2: 25% reduced size. 30% bonus movement speed. 15% / 20% / 30% / 35% (based on target's size) bonus damage. Lv 3: 30% reduced size. 35% bonus movement speed. 20% / 25% / 35% / 40% (based on target's size) bonus damage.

Glass Cannon.name: Glass Cannon
Glass Cannon.desc: You gain a health threshold equal to 70% maximum health which cannot be modified nor exceeded by any means. In return, you deal bonus true damage equal to a percentage of all of the damage you deal pre-mitigation. Lv 1: 15% extra true damage. Lv 2: 20% extra true damage. Lv 3: 30% extra true damage.

Goliath.name: Goliath
Goliath.desc: Grants bonus maximum health, adaptive force and size. Lv 1: 15% bonus maximum health 10% adaptive force 30% size Lv 2: 30% bonus maximum health 20% adaptive force 60% size Lv 3: 50% bonus maximum health 30% adaptive force 100% size

Goredrink.name: Goredrink
Goredrink.desc: Gain omnivamp. Lv 1: 15% omnivamp. Lv 2: 25% omnivamp.

Grevious Venom.name: Grevious Venom
Grevious Venom.desc: Dealing damage to an enemy champion reduces any upcoming shields and applies Grievous Wounds. If the target heals for a total amount that is over 60% of their maximum health while continuously afflicted with Grievous Wounds, the strength of the healing reduction is increased to 80%. This augment only reduces general and physical damage shields, but not purely magic damage blocking shields. Lv 1: 50% shield reduction. 3 seconds duration. Lv 2: 75% shield reduction. 4 seconds duration.

Growth Spurt.name: Growth Spurt
Growth Spurt.desc: Replaces Flee with Growth Spurt. Growth Spurt: Enlarge yourself, causing you to knock up enemies within 400 units for 1 second. For the next 7 seconds, you gain 300 (+ 20% maximum health) bonus health and 50% increased size. Lv 1: 6 seconds duration. 250 (+ 20% maximum health) bonus health. Lv 2: 10 seconds duration. 450 (+ 20% maximum health) bonus health.

Guilty Pleasure.name: Guilty Pleasure
Guilty Pleasure.desc: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion heals you ( 5 seconds cooldown per cast instance). Lv 1: Heal for 10 – 150 (based on level) (+ 1% maximum health). Lv 2: Heal for 10 – 150 (based on level) (+ 2% maximum health).

Hat Trick.name: Hat Trick
Hat Trick.desc: Gain 3 hats upon selecting this augment and permanently reduce the cost of Cappa Juice in your shop by 350. Upon dropping below 30% of your maximum health, gain 35% total movement speed and a 300 – 500 (based on level) (+ 75% bonus movement speed) shield for 3 seconds, but lose one hat every time this effect activates ( 3 seconds cooldown).

Heavy Hitter.name: Heavy Hitter
Heavy Hitter.desc: Basic attacks deal bonus physical damage equal to a percentage of your maximum health. Lv 1: 3.5% of your maximum health converted to bonus physical damage. Lv 2: 5% of your maximum health converted to bonus physical damage. Max-level effect: Your basic attacks deal addition physical damage equal to 50% of your additional size.

Hextech Soul.name: Hextech Soul
Hextech Soul.desc: Grants the Hextech Dragon Soul, or a different Dragon Soul if you already have it.

Hive Mind.name: Hive Mind
Hive Mind.desc: Start each round with a number of Bees following you; gain an additional Bee for each hit you or your teammate perform against Power Flowers, up to a maximum of 8 Bees. For each instance of damage dealt to an enemy champion you send a Bee to them, dealing 「 40 – 100 (based on level) (+ 20% bonus AD) (+ 20% AP) magic damage over 2 seconds 」「 5 – 12.5 (based on level) (+ 2.5% bonus AD) (+ 2.5% AP) magic damage every 0.25 seconds 」 on arrival. Bees return to you 6 seconds after being sent off. Lv 1: Start with 1 Bee. Lv 2: Start with 2 Bees. Lv 3: Start with 3 Bees. Max-level effect: Reduce the target's total attack speed by 30%.

Hold Very Still.name: Hold Very Still
Hold Very Still.desc: Gain an improved version of Teemo's Guerrilla Warfare. Guerrilla Warfare: Gain invisibility after 0.75 seconds without moving, being immobilized, taking damage, performing actions that break stealth, channeling, or being in stasis. Upon exiting stealth, gain 20% / 40% / 60% / 80% (based on level) bonus attack speed for 5 seconds and 100% bonus movement speed decaying over the same duration. Your next attack after exiting stealth deals 60 – 200 (based on level) (+ 60% bonus AD) (+ 40% AP) bonus magic damage. Invisibility is granted immediately at the start of the combat phase.

Holy Fire.name: Holy Fire
Holy Fire.desc: Your heals and shields cause you to fire a missile to the nearest enemy champion within 650 units over 0.32 seconds, applying a Burn upon arrival that deals magic damage based on the target's maximum health over time. The Burn's per-tick damage increases based on the relative value of the triggering heal or shield against the maximum health of the ally recipient. This counts as a Burn source. Lv 1: Minimum damage: 0.16% of the target's maximum health every second over 5 seconds, for a total of 0.8%. Maximum damage: 0.6% of the target's maximum health every second over 5 seconds, for a total of 3%. Lv 2: Minimum damage: 0.32% of the target's maximum health every second over 5 seconds, for a total of 1.6%. Maximum damage: 1.2% of the target's maximum health every second over 5 seconds, for a total of 6%.

Homeguard.name: Homeguard
Homeguard.desc: Gain bonus movement speed. This bonus is lost for 3 seconds after dealing damage to or taking damage from champions. Lv 1: 70% bonus movement speed. Lv 2: 140% bonus movement speed.

Hybrid.name: Hybrid
Hybrid.desc: Damaging attacks on-hit grant you increased damage on your next damaging champion ability. Damaging champion abilities grant you increased damage on your next attack on-hit. This effect does not stack. Lv 1: 20% increased attack and ability damage. Lv 2: 30% increased attack and ability damage. Lv 3: 40% increased attack and ability damage.

Ice Cold.name: Ice Cold
Ice Cold.desc: Your slowing effects reduce the movement speed of targets by an additional amount. Lv 1: -75 movement speed. Lv 2: -150 movement speed.

Impassable.name: Impassable
Impassable.desc: Gain the Aftershock and Glacial Augment keystone runes.

Infernal Conduit.name: Infernal Conduit
Infernal Conduit.desc: Your ability hits apply a Burn for 5 seconds that deals persistent magic damage ( 1 second cooldown per cast instance). This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application. Damage over time abilities can apply the effect only once every 2 seconds. Additionally, all of your Burn effects reduce the cooldowns of all your basic abilities for each tick of damage they deal to a target. This counts as a Burn source. Lv 1: 「 1.2 – 12 (based on level) (+ 2% bonus AD) (+ 0.9% AP) bonus magic damage per second 」「 6 – 60 (based on level) (+ 10% bonus AD) (+ 4.5% AP) bonus magic damage over the duration 」. 0.08 seconds cooldown reduction per tick. Lv 2: 「 1.2 – 12 (based on level) (+ 2.8% bonus AD) (+ 1.2% AP) bonus magic damage per second 」「 6 – 60 (based on level) (+ 14% bonus AD) (+ 6% AP) bonus magic damage over the duration 」. 0.08 seconds cooldown reduction per tick. Lv 3: 「 1.2 – 12 (based on level) (+ 4% bonus AD) (+ 1.8% AP) bonus magic damage per second 」「 6 – 60 (based on level) (+ 20% bonus AD) (+ 9% AP) bonus magic damage over the duration 」. 0.12 seconds cooldown reduction per tick.

Infernal Soul.name: Infernal Soul
Infernal Soul.desc: Grants the Infernal Dragon Soul, or a different Dragon Soul if one is already obtained.

It's Critical.name: It's Critical
It's Critical.desc: Grants critical strike chance. Lv 1: 50% critical strike chance. Lv 2: 75% critical strike chance. Max-level effect: Gain 25% critical strike damage.

It's Killing Time.name: It's Killing Time
It's Killing Time.desc: Upon casting your ultimate ability, you apply Zed's Death Mark to all enemy champions ( 8 seconds cooldown). The mark stores a percentage of all post-mitigation damage dealt to the affected target, detonating after 5 seconds to deal true damage equal to the damage stored against them. If this augment's cooldown elapses during the channel of Fiddlesticks' Crowstorm, Galio's Hero's Entrance or Pantheon's Grand Starfall, this effect activates right before their first respective damaging effect activates. Lv 1: 35% damage stored. Lv 2: 40% damage stored. Lv 3: 50% damage stored. Max-level effect: Heal for 100% of the damage done by this effect.

Jeweled Gauntlet.name: Jeweled Gauntlet
Jeweled Gauntlet.desc: Your abilities can now critically strike to deal higher damage. Additionally, gain critical strike chance based on your ability power. If both Jeweled Gauntlet and Vulnerability are equipped, only rolls the critical strike chance of the augment that has the higher critical damage (or either if equal). Lv 1: Crit damage modifier: 140% + bonus critical damage. 25% (+ 4% per 100 AP) critical strike chance. Lv 2: Crit damage modifier: 150% + bonus critical damage. 25% (+ 5% per 100 AP) critical strike chance. Lv 3: Crit damage modifier: 160% + bonus critical damage. 25% (+ 6% per 100 AP) critical strike chance.

Juice Box.name: Juice Box
Juice Box.desc: Each round, you and your ally gain several Juices ( ) for free that is automatically consumed at the start of the combat phase. Lv 1: 1 juice. Lv 2: 3 juices.

Juice Press.name: Juice Press
Juice Press.desc: The price of Juice of Haste, Juice of Power and Juice of Vitality in your and your teammate's shop is reduced by 50% ( 250). Juices that you and your teammate consume grant additional effects. Cappa Juice: 1 additional hat. Juice of Haste: 20% bonus movement speed. Juice of Power: 15% armor penetration and 15% magic penetration. Juice of Vitality: 25% heal and shield power. Removed since V26.09.

Juiced.name: Juiced
Juiced.desc: Basic attacks on-hit against enemy champions consume 2.5% of your maximum mana to deal bonus magic damage based on your maximum mana. This damage can critically strike for (100% + 30%) bonus damage. Lv 1: Base damage: 4.5% of your maximum mana Lv 2: Base damage: 9% of your maximum mana Max-level effect: Increase the damage of this effect by 10% each time you spend 400 mana.

Keystone Conjurer.name: Keystone Conjurer
Keystone Conjurer.desc: Gain the Arcane Comet and Summon Aery keystone runes. See Arena#Runes for Arena-specific overrides on Summon Aery.

Kill Secured.name: Kill Secured
Kill Secured.desc: Gain 60% bonus movement speed towards enemy champions below 40% of their maximum health.

Laser Eyes.name: Laser Eyes
Laser Eyes.desc: Continuously fire a laser in a line 700 units from your facing direction, dealing 5 – 60 (based on level) (+ 14% AD) (+ 9% AP) magic damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies in its width of 80 units. Lv 3: Max-level effect: The laser deals 1% increased damage every 0.3 seconds your enemy is in your sights. This effect resets if your enemy leaves your sights, and resets in each round.

Leg Day.name: Leg Day
Leg Day.desc: Gain bonus movement speed and slow resist. Lv 1: 40 bonus movement speed. 35% slow resist. Lv 2: 70 bonus movement speed. 55% slow resist.

Light 'em Up!.name: Light 'em Up!
Light 'em Up!.desc: Basic attacks on-hit generate a stack, up to 4. The fourth stack consumes them all to quickly launch 4 fireworks at the target that deal 11 – 80 (based on level) on-hit. Lv 1: 11 – 80 (based on level) (+ 35% bonus AD) (+ 19% AP) bonus magic damage × 90% damage modifier per firework, for a total of 39.6 – 288 (based on level) (+ 126% bonus AD) (+ 68.4% AP). Lv 2: Damage modifier increases to 100%, for a total of 44 – 320 (based on level) (+ 140% bonus AD) (+ 76% AP). Lv 3: Damage modifier increases to 110%, for a total of 48.4 – 352 (based on level) (+ 154% bonus AD) (+ 83.6% AP).

Light Warden.name: Light Warden
Light Warden.desc: Automatically cast Lux's Prismatic Barrier, throwing a warding light towards your ally which grants a shield for 28 – 79 (based on level) (+ 7.5% bonus AD) (+ 20% AP) to you and your ally for 2.5 seconds upon coming into contact with it. After reaching maximum range, the light then homes back to you to grant the same shield again when it passes through you and your ally, stacking with the previous shield and refreshing its duration ( 8 seconds cooldown). Lv 2: Max-level effect: Fire an additional light that grants the same shield for each enemy champion hit.

Lightning Strikes.name: Lightning Strikes
Lightning Strikes.desc: Increase your bonus attack speed gained from all sources. While at 3.0 attack speed or higher, your basic attacks deal 40 bonus magic damage on-hit. Lv 1: 15% total attack speed. Lv 2: 25% total attack speed. Max-level effect: Attack speed cap increases to 10.

Mad Scientist.name: Mad Scientist
Mad Scientist.desc: At the start of the combat phase in each round, gain either 30% adaptive force, bonus health and 40% increased size, or ability haste, 40% bonus movement speed and 40% reduced size. Lv 1: 20% bonus health. 70 ability haste. Lv 2: 40% bonus health. 100 ability haste.

Magic Missile.name: Magic Missile
Magic Missile.desc: Dealing damage to an enemy with an ability within 1000 units fires several missiles at them that each deal true damage equal to 0.33% of the target's maximum health, increased to up to 1% based on distance travelled. This effect can only trigger once every 6 seconds from the same cast. Lv 1: 3 missiles. Lv 2: 5 missiles. Max-level effect: Every 3 times this effect triggers, increase the number of missiles by 1 for the rest of the round.

Magical Girl.name: Magical Girl
Magical Girl.desc: Each round, a star falls over 15 seconds. You can pick up the star by walking within 200 units of its landing location. After picking it up, you transform into a Magical Girl, gain adaptive force and a shield. Upon transformation, you knock back nearby enemies to 1000 units from you, and cause them to dance for 2 seconds, but granting them invulnerability for the same duration. As a Magical Girl, every 5 to 10 seconds (based on the number of enemies within 700 units from you), several stars fall from the sky striking around you and each of your enemies, dealing 100 – 500 (based on level) (+ 25% AP) magic damage to those hit. Lv 1: 200 adaptive force. 200 shield. 2 stars in each fall. Lv 2: 300 adaptive force. 300 shield. 3 stars in each fall. Lv 3: 300 adaptive force. 500 shield. 5 stars in each fall.

Marksmage.name: Marksmage
Marksmage.desc: Basic attacks deal bonus physical damage based on your ability power. Lv 1: 75% AP converted to bonus physical damage. Lv 2: 115% AP converted to bonus physical damage.

Master of Duality.name: Master of Duality
Master of Duality.desc: Basic attacks on-hit grant 6 – 18 (based on level) ability power and ability casts grant 3 – 9 (based on level) bonus attack damage. This effect stacks infinitely and lasts until the end of the current round phase.

Mercy.name: Mercy
Mercy.desc: When your team triggers Combo Breaker by immobilizing an enemy champion for 4 seconds out of the last 7 seconds, you become enraged and your next immobilizing effects deal magic damage based on your maximum health to the target. This effect resets every round. Lv 1: 30% of your maximum health magic damage. Lv 2: 45% of your maximum health magic damage.

Mind to Matter.name: Mind to Matter
Mind to Matter.desc: Grants bonus health equal to a percentage of your maximum mana. Lv 1: 35% of your maximum mana converted to bonus health. Lv 2: 70% of your maximum mana converted to bonus health.

Minionmancer.name: Minionmancer
Minionmancer.desc: Your pets deal increased damage as well as gain bonus health and size. Lv 1: 40% increased damage, bonus health and size. Lv 2: 55% increased damage, bonus health and size.

Mirror Image.name: Mirror Image
Mirror Image.desc: Gain an improved version of LeBlanc's Mirror Image. Mirror Image: Upon being damaged to 30% maximum health, create 4 clones of yourself, after which you and your clones instantly become invisible for 1.25 seconds ( 30 seconds cooldown). Your clones can mimic your basic attack animation, though cannot deal damage and last for 8 seconds. One clone may move in front of you, the others will move toward random directions. Clones have a 25 bounty. Lv 2: Max-level effect: Your clones gain your augments and their basic attacks deal 20% damage.

Mountain Soul.name: Mountain Soul
Mountain Soul.desc: Grants the Mountain Dragon Soul, or a different Dragon Soul if one is already obtained.

Multitool.name: Multitool
Multitool.desc: Gain the Multitool in your inventory. At each Shopping Phase, you can choose 1 out of 5 random items on the top of your inventory for Multitool to transform into. Multitool can provide prismatic items after the 4th round. Removed since V26.09.

Mystic Punch.name: Mystic Punch
Mystic Punch.desc: Basic attacks on-hit reduce the remaining cooldowns of your abilities by 1.25 seconds.

Nesting Doll.name: Nesting Doll
Nesting Doll.desc: Upon taking fatal damage, you enter a downed state as normal but modify the arm time for the revive and automatically revive yourself without the help of your ally over 8 seconds. Additionally, you can enter the downed state for revival an additional time after the first revive, for a total of 2 revives per round. Each time you revive however, you respawn with reduced maximum health and size. The first revive reduces your maximum health by 20% and size by 20% and the second does so by 36% and 40% (80% total maximum health and 80% size for first revive, then 64% total maximum health and 60% size for the second), and so on. This effect only activates while your ally is alive and is cancelled immediately if they die while you are in the downed state. You and your ally can enter the downed state even after one of you has already been revived from one, though not a second time for your ally. If your ally stands in your revival zone, the revive occurs faster. Upon reviving, you knock back all nearby enemies. Lv 1: 2 seconds arm time. 1 extra revival. Lv 2: 3 seconds arm time. 2 extra revivals. Lv 3: 3 seconds arm time. 3 extra revivals. Max-level effect: Each ally gains an additional revive.

Now You See Me.name: Now You See Me
Now You See Me.desc: Replaces Flee with Now You See Me. Now You See Me: Passive: Casting an ability with a dash or blink leaves behind a mark at the cast location. Active: Blinks you to the mark's location and grants you 50% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds. Lv 2: Max-level effect: Increase the number of portals you can have at a time to 5.

Null.name: Null
Null.desc: No effect. Error: This augment is only granted when the Parasitic Mutation augment has failed to copy an augment.

Numb to Pain.name: Numb to Pain
Numb to Pain.desc: Gain Death's Dance's Ignore Pain. Ignore Pain: Reduce some post-mitigation damage received and instead store it to successively take it as true damage over 6 seconds, dealing a sixth of the stored damage each second. Lv 1: ( 25% / 10%) damage reduction. Lv 2: ( 40% / 25%) damage reduction. Max-level effect: Gain Death's Dance's Defy: Upon a champion takedown, cleanse the over-time damage.

Oathsworn.name: Oathsworn
Oathsworn.desc: Replaces Flee with Kalista's Fate's Call. Fate's Call: Retrieve your ally and hold them for 4 seconds, pulling them to yourself over 1 second and cleansing them from all crowd control, as well as rendering them invulnerable and untargetable for the duration ( 60 seconds cooldown). While being held, your ally is vanished and can dash with displacement immunity to end Fate's Call's effects and reappear at the target location; after the duration, they will automatically do so at maximum range from your facing direction. The ally's dash stops upon colliding with an enemy champion, knocking up all nearby enemies briefly and landing to their base attack range from the target collided with.

Ocean Soul.name: Ocean Soul
Ocean Soul.desc: Grants the Ocean Dragon Soul, which has a modified base heal value of 100, or a different Dragon Soul if one is already obtained.

OK Boomerang.name: OK Boomerang
OK Boomerang.desc: Automatically cast Sivir's Boomerang Blade at a nearby enemy, dealing physical damage to enemies hit ( 7 seconds cooldown). Lv 1: 39.5 – 201 (based on level) (+ 22% bonus AD) (+ 15% AP) physical damage. Lv 2: 109.5 – 271 (based on level) (+ 22% bonus AD) (+ 15% AP) physical damage.

Ominous Pact.name: Ominous Pact
Ominous Pact.desc: Your abilities now have a health cost of 5% current health to cast them. In return, you gain ability power, bonus movement speed and omnivamp based on your missing health. Lv 1: Capped at 70% missing health: 75 – 150 (based on level) ability power. 0% – 50% (based on missing health) bonus movement speed. 0% – 15% (based on missing health) omnivamp. Lv 2: Capped at 70% missing health: 75 – 150 (based on level) ability power. 0% – 75% (based on missing health) bonus movement speed. 0% – 25% (based on missing health) omnivamp.

Omni Soul.name: Omni Soul
Omni Soul.desc: Grants random Dragon Souls. Lv 1: 2 Dragon Souls. Lv 2: 3 Dragon Souls. Lv 3: 4 Dragon Souls.

Orbital Laser.name: Orbital Laser
Orbital Laser.desc: Replaces Flee with Orbital Laser. Orbital Laser: Call upon an orbital laser to fire down on the target location after 2.5 seconds, immediately dealing true damage equal to the 30% of the target's maximum health then 45 – 120 (based on level) magic damage every 0.5 seconds over 3 seconds to enemies within a 550 radius, up to a total of 270 – 720 (based on level).

Outlaw's Grit.name: Outlaw's Grit
Outlaw's Grit.desc: Dashing or blinking grants bonus armor and bonus magic resistance, stacking up to 5 times. This effect lasts until the end of the current round phase. Lv 1: 10 bonus resistances, stacking up to 5 times for a total of 50 bonus resistances. Lv 2: 15 bonus resistances, stacking up to 5 times for a total of 75 bonus resistances. Max-level effect: Gaining the stack doubles the bonusresistances for 2 seconds.

Overflow.name: Overflow
Overflow.desc: Your abilities' mana costs are doubled, but you also gain increased damage as well as self and outgoing healing and shielding, based on your maximum mana. Lv 1: 7% (+ 0.5% per 100 maximum mana) increased damage, healing and shielding. Lv 2: 15% (+ 0.5% per 100 maximum mana) increased damage, healing and shielding. Max-level effect: Reduce the current cooldown of one of your basic abilities by 5 seconds each time you spend 400 mana.

Pandora's Box.name: Pandora's Box
Pandora's Box.desc: Your current augments transform into an equal number of completely random Prismatic ones.

Panic Room.name: Panic Room
Panic Room.desc: Upon taking fatal damage for the first time, you become untargetable, transforming into a wisp, and are restored to a portion of your maximum health. After 1 second, dash to a random location on the map 1500–3000 units away at 3500 unit/s speed and become targetable again upon arrival. The target location is always inside the Ring of Fire and up to 1500 units away from its edge. Lv 1: 15% maximum health. Lv 2: 35% maximum health.

Parasitic Mutation.name: Parasitic Mutation
Parasitic Mutation.desc: Copy a random augment from either champion on the enemy team when the Combat Phase starts, with the copied augment changing every round.

Parasitic Relationship.name: Parasitic Relationship
Parasitic Relationship.desc: You heal for a part of the damage dealt by your ally. Lv 1: Ally damage to heal ratio: 15% (in teams of 2). 10% (in teams of 3). Lv 2: Ally damage to heal ratio: 22.5% (in teams of 2). 15% (in teams of 3)}}. Max-level effect: Excess healing from this augment is converted into a shield.

Perseverance.name: Perseverance
Perseverance.desc: Grants a great amount of base health regeneration, increased while below a certain health threshold. Lv 1: 600% base health regeneration. 1200% enhanced health regeneration. Below 25% maximum health. Lv 2: 1200% base health regeneration. 2400% enhanced health regeneration. Below 50% maximum health.

Phenomenal Evil.name: Phenomenal Evil
Phenomenal Evil.desc: Gain Veigar's Phenomenal Evil Power. Phenomenal Evil Power: Generate a permanent stack of Phenomenal Evil each time you damage an enemy champion with ability damage. This effect cannot trigger more than once every second globally and once every 5 seconds from the same cast instance. For each stack, gain ability power. If this is your second augment, start with 40 Phenomenal Evil stacks, granting you 40 ability power. Lv 1: 1 ability power per stack. Lv 2: 2 ability power per stack. Lv 3: Max-level effect: Gain 10% ability power.

Pinball.name: Pinball
Pinball.desc: Replaces Flee with Mark. Your Mark is empowered to instead throw a pinball, which deals 100 – 500 (based on level) bonus true damage and ricochets off of terrain that it collides with. Each time the pinball ricochets, its remaining travel distance is reset, it increases in radius by 25%, deals 20% increased damage, and reduces Mark's remaining cooldown by 30% of its total. The pinball can ricochet up to 4 times, for a maximum radius increase of 100% and a damage increase of 80%. Additionally, your Mark gains 50 ability haste.

Prismatic Egg.name: Prismatic Egg
Prismatic Egg.desc: Scoring a champion takedown generates a stack, once per champion per round. This augment will transform into a free Prismatic Item Anvil, a Prismatic Augment selection and a free Prismatic Stat Anvil at 5 stacks. These bonuses are granted at the start of the shop phase after a combat phase where the stack requirement is achieved.

Protein Shake.name: Protein Shake
Protein Shake.desc: Gain 25% (+ 35% per 100 bonus armor) (+ 35% per 100 bonus magic resistance) heal and shield power.

Purist - Caster.name: Purist - Caster
Purist - Caster.desc: Convert all of your bonus attack speed into ability haste at a rate of 0.65 ability haste per 1% bonus attack speed. Additionally, your abilities' total cooldowns are reduced by 10%.

Quantum Computing.name: Quantum Computing
Quantum Computing.desc: Automatically cast an improved version of Camille's Tactical Sweep, winding over 0.75 seconds to slash in a 650 radius around you. The slash deals physical damage to enemies within the area ( 12 seconds cooldown). Enemies hit by the outer edge of the circle take bonus physical damage equal to 10% (+ 2.5% per 100 bonus AD) (+ 1.6% per 100 AP) (+ 0.1% per 100 bonus health) of their maximum health and are slowed decaying over 2 seconds. Additionally, you are healed for a part of the bonus post-mitigation damage against enemy champions hit by the outer edge. Lv 1: 159 – 312 (based on level) (+ 85% bonus AD) (+ 50% AP) physical damage. 60% slow strength. Lv 2: 234 – 387 (based on level) (+ 85% bonus AD) (+ 50% AP) physical damage. 80% slow strength. Lv 3: 309 – 462 (based on level) (+ 85% bonus AD) (+ 50% AP) physical damage. 80% slow strength. Max-level effect: Your automatic effects have 25% / 10% / 1% (based on cast times) chance to multi-cast.

Quest: Angel of Retribution.name: Quest: Angel of Retribution
Quest: Angel of Retribution.desc: Quest: Heal allied champions for 2500 in total, or mitigate 2500 damage for them. Reward: Upon completing your Quest, gain 100% bonus attack speed and empower your basic attacks to deal bonus magic damage equal to 350% of your heal and shield power.

Quest: Icathia's Fall.name: Quest: Icathia's Fall
Quest: Icathia's Fall.desc: Gain Bami's Cinder. You can now purchase Hollow Radiance and Sunfire Aegis in spite of the item limit imposed by Immolate. Quest: Obtain Hollow Radiance and Sunfire Aegis. Reward: Upon completing your Quest, convert the items you obtained for the quest into Void Immolation. Void Immolation counts as 2 Burn effect sources.

Quest: Mad Hatter.name: Quest: Mad Hatter
Quest: Mad Hatter.desc: Quest: Wear 10 hats simultaneously. Reward: For each hat currently worn, gain 7.2 bonus Attack Damage or 12 Ability Power (Adaptive), 8 bonus armor, 8 bonus magic resistance, 3% tenacity and 4 bonus movement speed. However, you now lose half your hats upon losing a round. If the requirements are fulfilled at any point during a Combat Phase, only grants the rewards after the end of the current round. Rewards cannot be earned mid-combat.

Quest: Rite of the Forge God.name: Quest: Rite of the Forge God
Quest: Rite of the Forge God.desc: Quest: Purchase 2 Item Anvils ( / ). Reward: All of your items will become Masterwork, increasing their stats by 35%.

Quest: Steel Your Heart.name: Quest: Steel Your Heart
Quest: Steel Your Heart.desc: Quest: Obtain Heartsteel and accumulate over 400 bonus health from Colossal Consumption. Reward: Upon completing your Quest, increase the bonus health previously and future gained from Heartsteel's Colossal Consumption by 300%, and gain bonus health regeneration equal to 12.5% of the bonus health gained from Colossal Consumption.

Quest: Three Sacred Treasures.name: Quest: Three Sacred Treasures
Quest: Three Sacred Treasures.desc: Quest: Possess Hextech Gunblade, Infinity Edge and Perplexity. Reward: Attacks now fire in a narrow straight line, damaging all enemies within for 60% AP physical damage and 75% AD magic damage and applying on-hit effects twice. This augment is only available for Yunara and can only be offered during the first two rounds where Augment selection is available.

Quest: Urf's Champion.name: Quest: Urf's Champion
Quest: Urf's Champion.desc: Quest: Score 8 champion takedowns, up to one for each enemy per round. Reward: Upon completing your Quest, you receive The Golden Spatula. The Golden Spatula counts as a Burn source. Lv 2: Max-level effect: Increase this item's stats by 20%.

Quest: Wooglet's Witchcap.name: Quest: Wooglet's Witchcap
Quest: Wooglet's Witchcap.desc: Gain a Needlessly Large Rod that has its ability power stat modified to 120 AP. Quest: Obtain Rabadon's Deathcap and Zhonya's Hourglass. Reward: Upon completing your Quest, convert the items you obtained for the quest into Wooglet's Witchcap.

Rabble Rousing.name: Rabble Rousing
Rabble Rousing.desc: Casting an ability heals you, based on your maximum health. Lv 1: Heal for 5 – 60 (based on level) (+ 1% maximum health) Lv 2: Heal for 5 – 60 (based on level) (+ 2% maximum health) Max-level effect: Healing from ultimate abilities is doubled.

Rags to Riches.name: Rags to Riches
Rags to Riches.desc: Gain 2500 once this augment is removed or replaced.

Raid Boss.name: Raid Boss
Raid Boss.desc: At the start of the combat phase in each round, you are now imprisoned in the center of the battlefield for 9 seconds, becoming suppressed in the duration. While imprisoned, you gain 40% – 70% (based on current round) damage reduction (including against true damage) and crowd control immunity, and increase your attack damage, ability power, maximum health, and size according to the time you're imprisoned. At the end of the duration, or upon being damaged to 50% maximum health otherwise, you are set free, knocking back all nearby enemies and losing the damage reduction and crowd control immunity but keeping the other bonuses until the end of the round. Additionally, you receive a shield that absorbs damage equal to a percentage of your maximum health and lasts until destroyed. Lv 1: Increase stats by 0% – 35% (based on seconds imprisoned). 25% maximum health shield. Lv 2: Increase stats by 0% – 55% (based on seconds imprisoned). 40% maximum health shield.

Recursion.name: Recursion
Recursion.desc: Grants ability haste. Lv 1: 40 ability haste. Lv 2: 60 ability haste. Lv 3: 80 ability haste.

Repulsor.name: Repulsor
Repulsor.desc: Upon dropping below 60% or 30% of your maximum health, each for the first time in a round, knock back all enemies within a 500 radius by 750 units.

Restart.name: Restart
Restart.desc: Automatically refresh your basic abilities' cooldowns every several seconds. Lv 1: 12 seconds cooldown. Lv 2: 8 seconds cooldown.

Restless Restoration.name: Restless Restoration
Restless Restoration.desc: You constantly heal while moving. Lv 1: Heal for 0.2 – 1.2 (based on level) (+ 0.016% maximum health) per 10 units travelled. Lv 2: Heal for 0.2 – 1.2 (based on level) (+ 0.03% maximum health) per 10 units travelled.

Rice And Chicken.name: Rice And Chicken
Rice And Chicken.desc: Your champion's first basic ability (Q) gains increased damage and increased Healing and Shielding, but loses 50 ability haste. Lv 1: 50% increased damage. 30% increased Healing and Shielding. Lv 2: 75% increased damage. 50% increased Healing and Shielding. Max-level effect: Casting your first basic ability grants you 40% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

Rice And Fish.name: Rice And Fish
Rice And Fish.desc: Your champion's second basic ability (W) gains increased damage and increased Healing and Shielding, but loses 50 ability haste. Lv 1: 50% increased damage. 30% increased Healing and Shielding. Lv 2: 75% increased damage. 50% increased Healing and Shielding. Max-level effect: Casting your second basic ability grants you 40% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

Rice And Pork.name: Rice And Pork
Rice And Pork.desc: Your champion's third basic ability (E) gains increased damage and increased Healing and Shielding, but loses 50 ability haste. Lv 1: 50% increased damage. 30% increased Healing and Shielding. Lv 2: 75% increased damage. 50% increased Healing and Shielding. Max-level effect: Casting your third basic ability grants you 40% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

Righteous Fury.name: Righteous Fury
Righteous Fury.desc: Self and outgoing healing or shielding grants you increased ability damage ( 3 seconds cooldown). This effect can only occur once per cast instance, stacks infinitely and lasts until the end of the current round phase. Lv 1: 2% increased ability damage per stack. Lv 2: 3% increased ability damage per stack. Lv 3: 4% increased ability damage per stack.

Scavenger.name: Scavenger
Scavenger.desc: Increase your augment count to 6. When you defeat a team, a selection screen of their augments will open in the shopping phase of the next round. From now, Augment Selections only provide Augment Level Ups. If none of their augments are applicable to you, you'll gain 500 instead.

Scoped Weapons.name: Scoped Weapons
Scoped Weapons.desc: Gain ( 75 / 50) bonus attack range. Removed since V26.09.

Scopier Weapons.name: Scopier Weapons
Scopier Weapons.desc: Gain ( 200 / 100) bonus attack range. Removed since V26.09.

Scopiest Weapons.name: Scopiest Weapons
Scopiest Weapons.desc: Gain bonus attack range. Lv 1: ( 150 / 75) attack range. Lv 2: ( 225 / 125) attack range. Lv 3: ( 300 / 175) attack range.

Searing Dawn.name: Searing Dawn
Searing Dawn.desc: Gain Leona's Sunlight. Sunlight: Your abilities mark enemies, causing them to take bonus magic damage based on their maximum health from your ally's next basic attack or ability hit against them ( 0.75-second cooldown per target). Lv 1: 40 – 200 (based on level) (+ 2.5% of target's maximum health) bonus magic damage. Lv 2: 40 – 200 (based on level) (+ 4.5% of target's maximum health) bonus magic damage.

Self Destruct.name: Self Destruct
Self Destruct.desc: Automatically get a bomb attached to you that detonates after 15 seconds, creating an explosion that deals true damage based on the target's maximum health to enemies within 350 units and knocks them up for 0.75 seconds ( 15 seconds cooldown). The bomb's duration is not refreshed when the initial delay for the combat phase elapses. Lv 1: Explosion damage: 15% of the target's maximum health. Lv 2: Explosion damage: 25% of the target's maximum health.

Serve Beyond Death.name: Serve Beyond Death
Serve Beyond Death.desc: Upon taking fatal damage for the first time, you are restored to 100% maximum health but suffer true damage over time until you die from reaching 0 health. Scoring a champion takedown ends this effect's damage immediately and sets your current health to a percentage of maximum health. Lv 1: Suffer 8.33% of your maximum health true damage every 0.264 seconds over 3 seconds. Set to 20% maximum health on takedown. Lv 2: Suffer 4.67% of your maximum health true damage every 0.264 seconds over 6 seconds. Set to 30% maximum health on takedown.

Shadow Runner.name: Shadow Runner
Shadow Runner.desc: After dashing, blinking, or exiting stealth, gain bonus movement speed for a period of time. Lv 1: 200 bonus movement speed. 2 seconds duration. Lv 2: 400 bonus movement speed. 3 seconds duration.

Shrink Engine.name: Shrink Engine
Shrink Engine.desc: Scoring a champion takedown generates a stack, stacking infinitely. For each stack, gain 8 ability haste and 1% bonus movement speed, and reduce your size by 4%. Lose 50% of stacks on death. Size reduction is capped at 80% (20 stacks).

Shrink Ray.name: Shrink Ray
Shrink Ray.desc: Basic attacks reduce the target's damage dealt for 3 seconds, refreshing with each hit. Their size is also reduced significantly for the duration. Lv 1: 15% damage and size reduction. Lv 2: 20% damage and size reduction. Max-level effect: Do 5% / 10% / 15% / 20% (based on target's size) bonus damage to small targets.

Silver Spoon.name: Silver Spoon
Silver Spoon.desc: For each Silver augment you have, gain increased damage. Lv 1: 7.5% increased damage per Silver augment. Lv 2: 10% increased damage per Silver augment. Lv 3: 15% increased damage per Silver augment.

Skilled Sniper.name: Skilled Sniper
Skilled Sniper.desc: Hitting an enemy with a basic ability while located at least 700 units away from them at the time of the hit reduces the current cooldown of that ability to 0.5 seconds. If the ability hit is from a damage over time effect, the cooldown of the ability is instead reduced to 3 seconds if it is not already below that.

Slap Around.name: Slap Around
Slap Around.desc: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion grants you adaptive force, stacking infinitely ( 5 seconds cooldown per cast instance). This effect lasts until the end of the current round phase. Lv 1: 9 bonus Attack Damage or 15 Ability Power (Adaptive). Lv 2: 15 bonus Attack Damage or 25 Ability Power (Adaptive).

Slime Time.name: Slime Time
Slime Time.desc: Automatically cast Zac's Unstable Matter, releasing a burst of slime in a 450 radius around you and dealing 40 – 80 (based on level) (+ 3% – 7% (based on level) (+ 1.5% per 100 bonus AD) (+ 1.5% per 100 AP) of target's maximum health) magic damage to enemies hit ( 7 seconds cooldown). Additionally, hitting a champion secretes a slime blob toward a nearby location. Both you and enemy champions can interact with the blob by moving over it; you may consume it to heal yourself for 3% – 6% (based on level) of your maximum health, while an enemy may destroy it to deny the effect.

Slow and Steady.name: Slow and Steady
Slow and Steady.desc: Your base attack speed is set to a static amount of 0.65 and your attack rate no longer benefits from any source of attack speed bonuses. In return, you convert all bonus attack speed into bonus attack damage. Lv 1: Convert ratio: 0.75 bonus attack damage from every 1% bonus attack speed. Lv 2: Convert ratio: 1 bonus attack damage from every 1% bonus attack speed. Max-level effect: Gain 30% life steal.

Slow Cooker.name: Slow Cooker
Slow Cooker.desc: Surrounds you in flames, causing you to apply a Burn every second to enemies within 500 units for 5 seconds that deals magic damage. This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application. This counts as a Burn source. Lv 1: 「 0.26% of your maximum health per second. 」「 1.3% of your maximum health over the duration. 」 Lv 2: 「 0.35% of your maximum health per second. 」「 1.75% of your maximum health over the duration. 」 Lv 3: 「 0.45% of your maximum health per second. 」「 2.25% of your maximum health over the duration. 」

Snowball Fight!.name: Snowball Fight!
Snowball Fight!.desc: Replaces Flee with Mark / Dash. Mark: Throws a snowball in the target direction that deals 15 – 100 (based on level) true damage to the first enemy hit and marks them for 3 seconds ( 6 seconds cooldown). While the target is marked, you are granted the ability to cast Dash. Dash: You dash to the marked target while being untargetable, dealing the same damage again upon arrival.

Sonic Boom.name: Sonic Boom
Sonic Boom.desc: Granting a buff, heal, or shield to your ally deals 30 – 150 (based on level) true damage to enemies within 450 units of them and slows targets by 30% ( 2 seconds cooldown). Lv 1: 2 seconds slow duration. Lv 2: 3 seconds slow duration.

Soul Siphon.name: Soul Siphon
Soul Siphon.desc: Your critical strikes heal you for a part of damage dealt. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance. Lv 1: Heal for 10% damage done by critical strikes. Lv 2: Heal for 20% damage done by critical strikes.

Speed Demon.name: Speed Demon
Speed Demon.desc: Whenever you damage an enemy champion with an ability, gain bonus movement speed decaying over 0.75 seconds. Lv 1: 150 bonus movement speed. Lv 2: 300 bonus movement speed.

Spellcraft.name: Spellcraft
Spellcraft.desc: Replaces Flee with Spellcraft. Spellcraft: Wind up for 0.75 second and unleash a burst of energy to a 35° cone with 650 units radius in front of you, dealing 50 (+ 10% bonus AD) (+ 15% AP) magic damage to enemies within this cone. This deals 200% damage to enemies hit with outer edge, slowing them by 20% for 2 seconds. Hitting at least one enemy champion with the outer edge restores 5% of your missing health. Those effects get enhanced every time you select augments with following modifiers: * Each augment with a red sticker increases the magic damage by 75 (+ 20% bonus AD) (+ 30% AP). This value doubles to enemies hit with the outer edge. * Each augment with a blue sticker increases the slow effect by 40%. * Each augment with a green sticker increases the heal by 20%. At most 3 modifiers of the same kind can take effect.

Spellwake.name: Spellwake
Spellwake.desc: Hitting an enemy champion with an ability sends a trail centered from you to the location they were hit, detonating in a 100 width radius after 0.75 seconds to deal magic damage to enemies within. This effect can only trigger once every 6 seconds from the same cast. Lv 1: 100 – 325 (based on level) (+ 145% bonus AD) (+ 20% AP) magic damage. Lv 2: 100 – 325 (based on level) (+ 165% bonus AD) (+ 30% AP) magic damage. Max-level effect: Fire an additional wave 0.5 second after this effect is triggered.

Spin Me Right Round.name: Spin Me Right Round
Spin Me Right Round.desc: Replaces Flee with Akshan's Heroic Swing. Heroic Swing - Active: You can activate Heroic Swing three times before the ability goes on cooldown, and you can use the third cast only after 0.5 seconds of the second cast. An attack or movement command may be input to use the second and third casts. First Cast: Fire a hook in the target direction that embeds in the first terrain hit for 2 seconds. Heroic Swing's second cast can be used while the hook is attached. If the hook fails to attach or you become immobilized, grounded, or polymorphed within the duration, Heroic Swing is cancelled and placed on full cooldown. Second Cast: Swing around the terrain in either a clockwise or counterclockwise direction based on the position of the cursor relative to your facing direction, stopping upon colliding with an enemy champion or terrain.
