While swinging, fire at the nearest visible enemy within 500 units every 0.231 seconds to deal them 15 – 75 (based on level) (+ 15% AD) × (1 + 0.3 per 100% bonus attack speed) physical damage and apply on-hit effects for each shot, with on-hit damage reduced to 25% effectiveness. The dash will be interrupted if you are affected by any immobilizing or polymorphing crowd control during the dash. Third Cast: End the swing by jumping to the target location and fire one last shot at a nearby visible enemy. Scoring an enemy champion takedown reduces Heroic Swing's current cooldown to 0.5 seconds.

Spin To Win.name: Spin To Win
Spin To Win.desc: Your spinning abilities deal increased damage and benefit from ability haste. Lv 1: 25% increased damage. 25 ability haste. Lv 2: 35% increased damage. 35 ability haste.

Spirit Infusion.name: Spirit Infusion
Spirit Infusion.desc: Gain 10% heal and shield power. After casting your ultimate ability, increase your heal and shield power by 50% for 10 seconds ( 10 seconds cooldown). Removed since V26.09.

Spirit Link.name: Spirit Link
Spirit Link.desc: Redirect a part of the damage dealt to your ally to you, and heal yourself equal to a part of the healing they receive. Lv 1: 「 12.5% damage redirection (in teams of 2) 」「 10% damage redirection (in teams of 3) 」. 「 25% healing redirection (in teams of 2) 」「 20% healing redirection (in teams of 3) 」. Lv 2: 「 15% damage redirection (in teams of 2) 」「 12.5% damage redirection (in teams of 3) 」. 「 35% healing redirection (in teams of 2) 」「 25% healing redirection (in teams of 3) 」. Lv 3: 「 20% damage redirection (in teams of 2) 」「 15% damage redirection (in teams of 3) 」. 「 65% healing redirection (in teams of 2) 」「 30% healing redirection (in teams of 3) 」.

Stackosaurus Rex.name: Stackosaurus Rex
Stackosaurus Rex.desc: Increase the number of permanent stacks you gain from abilities by 75%.

Stats on Stats on Stats!.name: Stats on Stats on Stats!
Stats on Stats on Stats!.desc: Upon selecting this augment, gain Stat Bonus Anvils for free. Lv 1: 4 Stat Bonus Anvils. Lv 2: Gain another Stat Bonus Anvils, for a total of 5. Lv 3: Gain another Stat Bonus Anvils, for a total of 6. Max-level effect: Gain a Prismatic Stat Anvil. Increase stats from Stat Bonus Anvils by 20%.

Stats on Stats!.name: Stats on Stats!
Stats on Stats!.desc: Upon selecting this augment, gain Stat Bonus Anvils for free. Lv 1: 3 Stat Bonus Anvils. Lv 2: Gain another Stat Bonus Anvils, for a total of 4. Lv 3: Gain another Stat Bonus Anvils, for a total of 5. Max-level effect: Gain a Prismatic Stat Anvil. Increase stats from Stat Bonus Anvils by 20%.

Stats!.name: Stats!
Stats!.desc: Upon selecting this augment, gain Stat Bonus Anvils for free. Lv 1: 2 Stat Bonus Anvils. Lv 2: Gain another Stat Bonus Anvils, for a total of 3. Lv 3: Gain another Stat Bonus Anvils, for a total of 4. Max-level effect: Gain a Prismatic Stat Anvil. Increase stats from Stat Bonus Anvils by 20%.

Stuck In Here With Me.name: Stuck In Here With Me
Stuck In Here With Me.desc: Casting your ultimate ability grants you an aura for 2 seconds, growing in size over the duration to up to 500 units. After the duration, you taunt all enemies within the aura and gain 50% damage reduction for the same duration ( 30 seconds cooldown). Additionally, gain 30 ultimate haste. Aura is activated once the ultimate's effect starts or has elapsed.

Summoner Revolution.name: Summoner Revolution
Summoner Revolution.desc: The first several times you use each unique summoner spell in the current phase of the round, set its cooldown to 3 seconds instead of its default. Additionally, the cooldown of your Flash resets every round. Lv 1: First 1 time. Lv 2: First 2 times.

Summoner's Roulette.name: Summoner's Roulette
Summoner's Roulette.desc: Replace both of your summoner spells with random ones available in a pool. After using a summoner spell during the combat phase, replace the spell in the respective slot with another random one. Summoner Spell Pool: Banner of Command, Barrier, Blade Waltz, Castle, Cleanse, Mark / Dash, Defensive Maneuvers, Die Another Day, Exhaust, Feel the Burn, Flash, Flee, Ghost, Heal, Ignite, Vanish Lv 1: 6 seconds cooldown per slot. Lv 2: 4 seconds cooldown per slot. Max-level effect: Increase chance of rolling special summoner spells.

Symbiotic Mutation.name: Symbiotic Mutation
Symbiotic Mutation.desc: Copy a random augment from your teammate upon selecting this augment and upon entering a new round's Shop Phase, with the copied augment changing every round. This effect cannot grant you an augment that is not applicable to your champion.

Symphony of War.name: Symphony of War
Symphony of War.desc: Gain the Conqueror and Lethal Tempo keystone runes. See Arena#Runes for Arena-specific overrides on these keystones.

Tank Engine.name: Tank Engine
Tank Engine.desc: Scoring a champion takedown permanently grants bonus maximum health and size. This effect can be triggered only once per champion per round. Lv 1: 2% bonus maximum health. 10% size. Lv 2: 5% bonus maximum health. 15% size.

Tank It Or Leave It.name: Tank It Or Leave It
Tank It Or Leave It.desc: Gain Critical Defend Chance equal to 100% of your critical strike chance, up to critical strike chance. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance. Critical Defend Chance: Grants you a chance to reduce an instance of damage taken. Lv 1: 15% + 25% of critical strike damage damage reduction. Lv 2: 25% + 25% of critical strike damage damage reduction.

Tap Dancer.name: Tap Dancer
Tap Dancer.desc: Basic attacks on-hit grant bonus movement speed, stacking infinitely and lasting until the end of the current round phase. Additionally, gain bonus attack speed equal to 10% of your total movement speed. Lv 1: 8 bonus movement speed. Lv 2: 10 bonus movement speed. Lv 3: 12 bonus movement speed. Max-level effect: Attack speed cap increases to 10.

The Brutalizer.name: The Brutalizer
The Brutalizer.desc: Grants bonus attack damage, ability haste, and lethality. Lv 1: 20 bonus attack damage. 15 ability haste. 15 lethality. Lv 2: 50 bonus attack damage. 35 ability haste. 30 lethality.

Thread the Needle.name: Thread the Needle
Thread the Needle.desc: Grants armor penetration and magic penetration. Lv 1: 15% armor penetration and magic penetration. Lv 2: 20% armor penetration and magic penetration. Lv 3: 35% armor penetration and magic penetration.

Tormentor.name: Tormentor
Tormentor.desc: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion inflicts them with a Burn for 5 seconds, dealing magic damage based on the target's maximum health ( 5 seconds cooldown per cast instance). This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application. This counts as a Burn source. Lv 1: 「 0.6% of the target's maximum health per second 」「 3% of the target's maximum health over the duration 」 magic damage. Lv 2: 「 0.8% of the target's maximum health per second 」「 4% of the target's maximum health over the duration 」 magic damage. Lv 3: 「 1.2% of the target's maximum health per second 」「 6% of the target's maximum health over the duration 」 magic damage.

Trailblazer.name: Trailblazer
Trailblazer.desc: Dashing or blinking causes you to inflict the nearest enemy champion within 650 units with a Burn for 5 seconds, dealing magic damage based on the target's maximum health ( 1.5 seconds cooldown per cast instance). This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application. This counts as a Burn source. Lv 1: 「 0.7% of the target's maximum health per second. 」「 3.5% of the target's maximum health over the duration. 」 Lv 2: 「 1% of the target's maximum health per second. 」「 5% of the target's maximum health over the duration. 」

Transmute: Chaos.name: Transmute: Chaos
Transmute: Chaos.desc: Gain two completely random augments, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment.

Transmute: Gold.name: Transmute: Gold
Transmute: Gold.desc: Gain one random Gold augment, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment.

Transmute: Prismatic.name: Transmute: Prismatic
Transmute: Prismatic.desc: Gain one random Prismatic augment, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment.

Transmute: Silver.name: Transmute: Silver
Transmute: Silver.desc: Gain completely random silver augments to fill all available slots. You can no longer receive new augments, but replace or upgrade existing ones.

Trash To Treasure.name: Trash To Treasure
Trash To Treasure.desc: Gain a prismatic augment selection when this augment is removed or replaced.

Trickster Demon.name: Trickster Demon
Trickster Demon.desc: Upon exiting stealth, unleash an explosion in a 300 radius around you, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies. Upon your clones and traps being destroyed or expiring, they will also trigger this effect around them. Lv 1: 200 – 400 (based on level) (+ 30% bonus AD) (+ 40% AP) magic damage. Lv 2: 400 – 600 (based on level) (+ 40% bonus AD) (+ 60% AP) magic damage.

Trueshot Prodigy.name: Trueshot Prodigy
Trueshot Prodigy.desc: Upon damaging an enemy while located at over 700 units away at the time of the hit, cast Ezreal's Trueshot Barrage in their direction. The barrage deals 175 – 525 (based on level) (+ 100% bonus AD) (+ 70% AP) magic damage to enemies it passes through. This augment has cooldown on each target. Lv 1: 10 seconds cooldown per target. Lv 2: 8 seconds cooldown per target. Lv 3: 6 seconds cooldown per target. Max-level effect: Fires an additional missile upon hit.

Twice Thrice.name: Twice Thrice
Twice Thrice.desc: Basic attacks generate a stack. At maximum stack, your next basic attack consumes all stacks to apply on-hit effects again at 100% effectiveness. Lv 1: Maximum stack: 2. Lv 2: Maximum stack: 1.

Twin Fire.name: Twin Fire
Twin Fire.desc: Damaging abilities against enemy champions launch Firecrackers at the target that each deal 10 – 30 (based on level) (+ 7% bonus AD) (+ 7% AP) magic damage ( 5 seconds cooldown). Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance. Lv 1: 1 (+ 1 per 50% critical strike chance) Firecrackers. Lv 2: 1 (+ 1 per 33.3% critical strike chance) Firecrackers. Lv 3: 1 (+ 1 per 25% critical strike chance) Firecrackers.

Typhoon.name: Typhoon
Typhoon.desc: Basic attacks fire a bolt at an additional target that deals physical damage and applies on-hit effects at 100% effectiveness. Lv 1: 20% AD physical damage. Lv 2: 50% AD physical damage.

Ultimate Revolution.name: Ultimate Revolution
Ultimate Revolution.desc: Casting your ultimate ability resets its cooldown immediately after its effect starts or has elapsed. This may occur only once per phase in a round. Lv 2: Max-level effect: Your ultimate can refresh for a second time.

Ultimate Roulette.name: Ultimate Roulette
Ultimate Roulette.desc: Replaces Flee with a random champion's ultimate ability, available from a pool. After using the granted ultimate ability during the combat phase, replace the ultimate in the respective slot with another random one after the cooldown for this effect elapses (20 / 17.5 / 15 (based on level) seconds cooldown, increased to 25 / 22.5 / 20 (based on level) for Dr. Mundo's Maximum Dosage). Ultimate Ability Pool: Cho'Gath's Feast, Dr. Mundo's Maximum Dosage, Gangplank's Cannon Barrage, Gragas' Explosive Cask, Lucian's The Culling, Lux's Final Spark, Morgana's Soul Shackles. You can receive your own champion's ultimate ability from this augment. Ultimate abilities granted by this effect count as an ultimate for all purposes.

Ultimate Unstoppable.name: Ultimate Unstoppable
Ultimate Unstoppable.desc: Casting your ultimate ability grants you crowd control immunity ( 8 seconds cooldown). Lv 1: 2 seconds duration. Lv 2: 5 seconds duration.

Undying Guard.name: Undying Guard
Undying Guard.desc: Upon activating Cultivation of War's revive, deal 75 (+ 100% AD) (+ 110% AP) (+ 15% of target's current health) physical damage to nearby enemies and knock back all targets hit up to 700 units over 0.75 seconds, as well as stunning them for the same duration. For the next 4 seconds, gain 30% bonus movement speed and become invulnerable against enemy champions farther than 450 units from yourself. This augment is only available for Zaahen.

Unshackled.name: Unshackled
Unshackled.desc: You can now cast Sylas' Hijack on your ally to steal their ultimate ability. When you score a takedown, the total lockout duration on a single target and the total cooldown of your ultimate are reduced by 20%. Gain 60 Ultimate Haste. This augment is only available for Sylas.

Unstable Transmutation.name: Unstable Transmutation
Unstable Transmutation.desc: At the start of each round, this augment transforms into a random augment, either without levels or at its max level.

Upgrade Collector.name: Upgrade Collector
Upgrade Collector.desc: Gain 250 on taking this augment. Upgrades The Collector, empowering Death to have its execution threshold increased by 1% each time you kill an enemy champion, capped at a threshold of 15% of the target's maximum health, and Taxes to generate higher gold from kills. Lv 1: Additional 200 from kills. Lv 2: Additional 500 from kills.

Upgrade Hubris.name: Upgrade Hubris
Upgrade Hubris.desc: Gain 250 on taking this augment. Upgrades Hubris, empowering Eminence to heal you for 5% maximum health + (1% per stack) missing health upon being triggered and grant you 10 (+ 5 per stack) bonus movement speed for its duration.

Upgrade Sword of Blossoming Dawn.name: Upgrade Sword of Blossoming Dawn
Upgrade Sword of Blossoming Dawn.desc: Upgrades Sword of Blossoming Dawn, empowering Peppermint to have its healing increased by 250%. Additionally, you gain 100% bonus attack speed.

Vanish.name: Vanish
Vanish.desc: Replaces Flee with Vanish. Vanish: Grants invisibility for 4 seconds. Attacking or casting abilities ends the stealth immediately. Lv 1: 3 second duration. Lv 2: 6 second duration. Max-level effect: Casting this spell grants you 25% bonus movement speed.

Veil of Warding.name: Veil of Warding
Veil of Warding.desc: Grants a spell shield that blocks the next hostile ability every several seconds (cooldown timer does not restart from champion damage taken). Lv 1: 20 seconds cooldown. Lv 2: 10 seconds cooldown.

Vengeance.name: Vengeance
Vengeance.desc: After your ally dies once, gain increased damage and omnivamp for the remainder of the round. Lv 1: 「 24% increased damage (teams of 2). 」「 15% increased damage (teams of 3). 」 「 24% omnivamp (teams of 2). 」「 15% omnivamp (teams of 3). 」 Lv 2: 「 28% increased damage (teams of 2). 」「 20% increased damage (teams of 3). 」 「 28% omnivamp (teams of 2). 」「 20% omnivamp (teams of 3). 」 Lv 3: 「 32% increased damage (teams of 2). 」「 25% increased damage (teams of 3). 」 「 32% omnivamp (teams of 2). 」「 25% omnivamp (teams of 3). 」

Vulnerability.name: Vulnerability
Vulnerability.desc: Damage dealt by items and damage over time effects can now critically strike for extra damage. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance. If both Vulnerability and Jeweled Gauntlet are equipped, only rolls the critical strike chance of the augment that has the higher critical damage (or either if equal). Lv 1: 140% + bonus critical damage extra damage. Lv 2: 170% + bonus critical damage extra damage.

Warmup Routine.name: Warmup Routine
Warmup Routine.desc: Replaces Flee with Warmup Routine. Warmup Routine: Channel for up to 10 seconds to increase your damage output by 2% per second, up to 20%. The damage amplification lasts until the end of the current round phase. Lv 1: 20% maximum extra damage. Lv 2: 40% maximum extra damage. Max-level effect: Gain permanently increased damage when you reach maximum stacks in a round. Now your partner can join the dance to gain stacks faster.

We'll Be Right Back.name: We'll Be Right Back
We'll Be Right Back.desc: Replaces Flee with Time Stop. Time Stop: Immediately put yourself in stasis, and after a 0.33-second delay, all nearby champions as well. While in stasis, become untargetable and invulnerable for the duration but also unable to move, declare basic attacks, cast abilities, use summoner spells, or activate items. The stasis lasts 1.75 seconds for yourself, and 2.5 seconds for all other champions affected. During the effect, heal yourself for「 25% of your missing health over the duration. 」「 3.571% of your missing health (at the time of cast) every 0.25 seconds. 」 Lv 1: Heal for 25% of your missing health. Lv 2: Heal for 50% of your missing health. Max-level effect: You can now move when in stasis.

Weighted Popoffs.name: Weighted Popoffs
Weighted Popoffs.desc: Hitting an enemy champion with an ability generates a stack of Popoff for 6 seconds, stacking up to 6 times. For each stack, your basic abilities' cooldowns progress faster. At maximum Popoff stacks, this value is doubled. Lv 1: Progress 2.5% faster, for a total of 30% at maximum stacks. Lv 2: Progress 5% faster, for a total of 60% at maximum stacks.

Wild Fire.name: Wild Fire
Wild Fire.desc: Automatically cast Brand's Pyroclasm to an enemy champion within 750 units. The bouncing fireball deals magic damage to the target ( 12 seconds cooldown). The fireball can bounce between you and enemy champions, up to several times. Lv 1: 350 (+ 30% bonus AD) (+ 40% AP) magic damage. 3 maximum bounces. Lv 2: 450 (+ 30% bonus AD) (+ 40% AP) magic damage. 4 maximum bounces. Lv 3: 550 (+ 30% bonus AD) (+ 40% AP) magic damage. 6 maximum bounces. Max-level effect: Max bounce count increases by 1.

Willing Sacrifice.name: Willing Sacrifice
Willing Sacrifice.desc: When your ally drops below 30% of their maximum health, reduce your current health by 25% to grant them a shield equal to a percentage of your current health for 10 seconds. Lv 1: 25% of your current health shield. Lv 2: 35% of your current health shield. Max-level effect: When this effect triggers, your teammate will be cleansed as well.

Wind Beneath Blade.name: Wind Beneath Blade
Wind Beneath Blade.desc: Gain 1.5 bonus movement speed per 1 Lethality or flat magic penetration, and 5 bonus movement speed per 5% armor penetration or magic penetration.

Wisdom of Ages.name: Wisdom of Ages
Wisdom of Ages.desc: Grants 1 level upon selecting this augment and 1 additional level at the start of every other round. Additionally, the level cap for your champion is removed, allowing them to benefit from effects that scale past level 18, including stat growth. If this augment is picked after Round 4, gain 3 levels upon selecting the augment instead of 1.

Witchful Thinking.name: Witchful Thinking
Witchful Thinking.desc: Grants ability power. Lv 1: 60 ability power. Lv 2: 120 ability power. Lv 3: 180 ability power.

With Haste.name: With Haste
With Haste.desc: Grants bonus movement speed based on your ability haste. Lv 1: 120% of your ability haste converted to movement speed. Lv 2: 225% of your ability haste converted to movement speed.

Zealot.name: Zealot
Zealot.desc: Gain 35% (+ 5% per 100 AP) bonus attack speed and 25% (+ 5% per 100 AP) critical strike chance based on your ability power.
